mapper.select: SELECT JOB_NUMBER, ROADMAP_IMAGE_PATH FROM TBL_ROADMAP WHERE JOB_NUMBER = #{jobNumber}
SELECT ROADMAP_JOB_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, ROADMAP_JOB_NAME, ROADMAP_JOB_DESC FROM TBL_ROADMAP_JOB WHERE JOB_NUMBER = #{jobNumber} ORDER BY ROADMAP_JOB_NUMBER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ROADMAP_JOB ( ROADMAP_JOB_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, ROADMAP_JOB_NAME, ROADMAP_JOB_DESC ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROADMAP_JOB_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{jobNumber}, #{roadmapJobName}, #{roadmapJobDesc} )
mapper.select: SELECT CURRICULUM_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, SKILL_TYPE, SKILL_NAME, SKILL_DESC FROM TBL_ROADMAP_CURRICULUM WHERE JOB_NUMBER = #{jobNumber} ORDER BY CASE WHEN SKILL_TYPE = '기초 다지기' THEN 1 WHEN SKILL_TYPE = '보안기초 다지기' THEN 2 WHEN SKILL_TYPE = '실습' THEN 3 WHEN SKILL_TYPE = '결과물' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END, CURRICULUM_NUMBER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ROADMAP_CURRICULUM ( CURRICULUM_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, SKILL_TYPE, SKILL_NAME, SKILL_DESC ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROADMAP_CURRICULUM_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{jobNumber}, #{skillType}, #{skillName}, #{skillDesc} )
mapper.select: SELECT REC_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, REC_TYPE, REC_NAME FROM TBL_ROADMAP_REC WHERE JOB_NUMBER = #{jobNumber} ORDER BY CASE WHEN REC_TYPE = '추천기술' THEN 1 WHEN REC_TYPE = '추천성향' THEN 2 WHEN REC_TYPE = '추천자격증' THEN 3 ELSE 99 END, REC_NUMBER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ROADMAP_REC ( REC_NUMBER, JOB_NUMBER, REC_TYPE, REC_NAME ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROADMAP_REC_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{jobNumber}, #{recType}, #{recName} )
